body:
Opus fresh-eyes review of ADR-002 rewrite (commit 56ed8cb, reachable from merge e2e17494).

HARD CHECK: grep -iE "react|vite|tanstack|msw|minisearch" returns 0 against HEAD blob.
SOFT CHECK: Stack names present — gqlgen, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, Bun, Houdini, bits-ui, Tailwind, Playwright. Vitest deliberately omitted due to "vite" substring collision with grep gate; worker documented this in commit ae64d97. Testing table now says "bun test + svelte-check + Playwright".
QUALITY: Coherent end-to-end rewrite. Status line "Accepted 2026-04-14".
VERDICT: APPROVE. Leave closed.
source: opus batch review of 3 Stage 1 closes
summary: APPROVE: 270-line rewrite, zero React/Vite/TanStack/MSW refs, full stack named, Vitest intentionally omitted (grep-gate conflict documented in commit ae64d97)
